item.title: Denzel brings the clarity.
item.description: You can basically transpose the things he's saying to achieving any type of goal in contemporary society, which is the biggest stage there is right now.

item.title: He paused his Euro truck simulator to help him
item.dc:creator: Cyberball2073

item.title: I'm so tired
item.description: I have been fighting for better support for men for over a decade. Marching for better treatment of men who have been the victims of abuse. Boys who have been assaulted getting the care they need. I love what I do. But somedays it gets so hard, spending more time kicking out men who blame women for everything. Saying they are abused because their wife wants a divorce because "all I did was sleep with some girl on a trip". People who think men's rights means less rights for women. Men who think it's abuse because women cover their drinks. Who tell the boys who were raped that they are "lucky" because the animal that hurt them was hot. It's hard to fight for support when you have to keep condemning your "allies" because they wear fucking swastikas. Men lack support and rights in this area not because of women, or LGBTQ+, or immigrants. It's because of other men.
item.dc:creator: thetinymonarch

item.title: By my math it's $13.25/hr, but still more than minimum wage.
item.description: Hands up who making less than the literary depiction of the poor?

Ok. Be back more on time next week :3

item.title: Cake day mini dump
item.description:
Well, I guess my cake day was actually yesterday, as it's now 5 min after midnight, but I still wanted to post because it's the 1st one I've remembered in my 8 years as an imgurian! (Boy, that was a long sentence. Don't come at me grammar police!) Help me celebrate with upvotes instead!
(I'm a woman who loves a nice grey sweatpant.)
item.dc:creator: justyouraveragepeacock

item.title: Dammit Chad
item.description: Message to my fellow straight dudes, always go down on a woman before she goes down on you. It’ll… change things in your life.

item.dc:creator: IwishKimPinewasmygirlfriend

item.title: The struggle bus is real.
item.description: I wish I could say that this is seasonal, but I've been battling with severe depression for years. But I finally hit rock bottom again, and I'm struggling to maintain my composure. You'd figure the beautiful wife, big house, and nice car would ease the pain, but it doesn't. However, I am proud to say that I didn't pull the trigger two months ago nor follow through with suffocating myself last month. I just simply remind myself that this pain is temporary, and I just need to wait it out. If anyone wants to chat or is curious about anything, don't be afraid to ask.
item.dc:creator: HannibalLectersCatMittens

item.title: Happy FF <3
item.description: A bit early today cause I gotta catch a flight :) Idk if Ill be around next week, so in case I wont: Happy early Thanksgiving <3
